PostfixClause

A clause that will be appended to the SELECT statement, following the where clause. Most commonly used for clauses like ORDER BY.

virtual string PostfixClause { get; set; }

Returns

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

PrefixClause

A clause that will be inserted between the SELECT keyword and the SELECT COLUMN LIST. Most commonly used for clauses like DISTINCT or ALL.

virtual string PrefixClause { get; set; }

Returns

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

fClearDirty int

SpatialRel

The spatial relationship checked by the filter.

virtual esriSpatialRelEnum SpatialRel { get; set; }

Returns

esriSpatialRelEnum

Examples

Sample Snippet

SpatialRelDescription

The array elements which describe the spatial relation between the query geometry and the requested geometries. There are 9 chars in this string which can be either 'F', 'T' or ''; e.g., TTFFT***' represents CONTAIN.

virtual string SpatialRelDescription { get; set; }

Returns

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

SpatialResolution

The spatial resolution in which to output geometry.

virtual double SpatialResolution { get; set; }

Returns

double
